title: lastrea subnigra
intro: Lastrea subnigra, also known as the black spleenwort fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lastrea subnigra include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Lastrea subnigra typically involve drying and processing the plant's fronds, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules for consumption.
